name: OHIO VALLEY BANC CORP
summary: PART I ITEM 1 - BUSINESS Organizational History and Subsidiaries Ohio Valley Banc Corp. (Ohio Valley) is an Ohio corporation registered as a financial holding company pursuant to the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended (BHC Act). Ohio Valley was incorporated under the laws of the State of Ohio on January 8, 1992 and began conducting business on October 23, 1992.
